def: A shape made by putting two or more simple shapes together.
example: A house shape is a square plus a triangle joined together.

def: To break a big shape into smaller, simpler shapes you already know.
example: Cut the house shape into a square and a triangle to make it easier.

def: The area of all the smaller shapes added together.
example: Square is 16 and triangle is 6, so the total area is 22 square cm.

def: The amount of flat space inside a shape, measured in square units.
example: The flat space inside one part is 9 square cm.
